description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a perimeter wall and landscaped with trees and grass. The building features a flat roof with a central skylight or light well, and a prominent entrance flanked by vertical blue accent panels. The property includes a paved driveway and parking area with several cars, as well as a small green backyard. The exterior walls are a mix of white and dark gray, with some brickwork visible on the side and rear boundaries. The overall layout is rectangular, with the main structure centrally located and ample open space around it.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a central skylight, surrounded by a walled yard, trees, and a paved parking area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, blue accent panels, driveway, and parked cars.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, brick boundary wall, and rear green space.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, parking spaces, and the central skylight on the roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the driveway, trees, and a clear look at the flat roof and boundary walls.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
